message:
feat(codegen): Migrate comparison.zig to builder API

- List literal .items access: Use emitParens helper
- Array slice &(...) patterns: Use emitParens helper
- Conditional block expr wrapping: Use emitParens when needed
- String identity comparison (is/is not): Use withParensCtx
- Tuple membership check: Use withParensCtx with loop
- Class instance identity: Use withParensCtx
- Empty list comparison: Use withParensCtx with context struct

Migrated 11 of 14 patterns. Remaining 3 are structural patterns
spanning the entire function (outer comparison wrapper, chained
comparison parens) that are lower risk.
